display.purpose: Event titles, hero headings, primary CTAs. DM Sans, weight 700.

body.purpose: Descriptions, list content, general copy. Inter variable, optical sizing on.

mono.purpose: Timestamps, curator codes, technical fragments. DM Mono.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card lift on hover, paired with translateY(-3px).

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button rest shadow, gold-tinted on hover.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Gold gradient pill CTA with a diagonal shine sweep on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: none; padding: 11px 24px; font-family: 'DM Sans', Inter, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 14px; color: #0a0a0a; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #9c7b18 0%, #7e6210 100%); border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.14), 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.1); transition: transform .2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow .28s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 40%, rgba(255,255,255,.18) 50%, transparent 60%); background-size: 200% 100%; background-position: 200% 0; transition: background-position .45s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover::after { background-position: -40% 0; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(156,123,24,.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9c7b18; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Event Card
components.description: Live-map event card, flat at rest, lifts on hover.
components.html:
Rooftop Jazz Night
Shoreditch · Tonight, 8pm
components.css: .ds-event-card { background: #f7f6f2; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px; transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease; } .ds-event-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(25,26,28,.08); } .ds-event-card-title { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: #191a1c; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-event-card-meta { font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #6a6862; }

narrative.overview: Cumulus reads as a warm, sun-worn sheet of city paper with a thread of gold running through it. By day, the surface is a soft parchment cream; by night — driven by actual London time — it flips to a near-black sky, and the gold accent warms slightly as if catching different light at a different hour. The interface is meant to feel like a physical object tied to the city outside the user's window, never a dashboard. This system explicitly rejects generic corporate SaaS chrome and try-hard nightlife/club-app energy. Gold is the one accent color and it is used sparingly and consistently across both themes.
keyCharacteristics: One accent (gold/ochre) carries identity across both light and dark themes; never joined by a second saturated hue.
Day/night is real, driven by time-of-day, not user preference.
Buttons and cards are tactile and inviting: they lift, shine, and respond to touch.
Shadows are soft, diffuse, and ambient — they bloom on interaction, not at rest.

rules.name: The One Thread Rule
rules.body: Gold is the only accent color in the system. It appears consistently across both day and night themes so the identity never breaks when the sky changes.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Nothing casts a shadow at rest. Depth is earned only through interaction — a hover, a press, a focus ring.

dos: Do keep gold as the single accent across both light and dark themes.
Do use soft, multi-layer, low-opacity shadows for any hover/elevation state.
Do let buttons and cards feel physically responsive on interaction.
Do keep event pins and details visible regardless of perk/curator-code gating.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated accent color alongside gold.
Don't use generic corporate SaaS chrome.
Don't reach for nightlife/club-app energy, even for curator-gated features.
Don't give cards or surfaces a resting shadow.
Don't use border-left/border-right colored stripes as an accent treatment.
